response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, distributed systems design, or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts, despite strong general engineering and open-source contributions.
strengths: Demonstrated full-stack versatility and open-source leadership with multiple public projects
Strong track record of mentoring and teaching via workshops, code katas, and courses
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across diverse domains including GIS, real-time data, and DevOps tooling
concerns: Only sporadic C++ exposure; no evidence of 8+ years of professional C++ development
No clear experience building or leading cloud compute platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure infrastructure)
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps teams or ownership of large-scale distributed systems
